examples: Hornfels, skarnization, troilite and gold mineralization were formed in their contact segment.
The sulfide (especially troilite) contained in coal seams is representative a kind of strong reducing environment.
The Lujiang meteorite, a chondrite whose petrochemical type is LL6, contains the following opaque minerals: kamacite, taenite, disordered taenite, troilite, chromite, hematite, ilmenite. etc.
